title: Additive Statuses
description: Exceed the usual potion duration, stacking your brews to infinity!
body:
This mod makes a small change to the way status effects work.

## Default Settings

Normally, consuming a potion (example; 8 minutes of Strength) will **set** the duration of the effect to 8 minutes, regardless of how many times you drink it, with it being the longest possible within the game.

However, with Additive Statuses installed, these potions will instead **add** to the total duration of the effect.

## Configuration
Accessing the config file or using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/versions), the following can be done: 
### Cycle Amplification
When activated, when the duration of an effect hits an indicated "maximum duration", it will set the duration to an indicated "starting duration", while increasing the amplification of the effect by 1.

Specific effects can be blacklisted from this, by default, effects that aren't changed by amplification (e.x; Night Vision) are on the list.
### Duration Limitation
When activated, duration of all effects cannot actively exceed the indicated "maximum duration".
